contract_status.warning: This JSON file is a repo anchor and governance contract object. It is not a deployed smart contract, token contract, or Zora mint contract. On-chain addresses must not be added unless independently verified.

canon_state.publication_surface_rule: Base and Zora provide public timestamp / publication surfaces; they are not proof by themselves.

zora_flywheel.role: Mint and receipt surface for public artifacts after promotion gates.

receipt_status_codes.CANDIDATE: Claim exists; source receipts not fully verified.
receipt_status_codes.CANON: Claim verified with public OSINT receipts and no unresolved contradictory evidence.
receipt_status_codes.CLAIMED_VERIFIED_PENDING_HASH_REVIEW: User-provided registry marks receipt as verified, but this anchor still requires URL, archive, and hash review before CANON.

zora_status_codes.NOT_MINTED_READY: Eligible for future Zora queue only after hash/receipt review.
zora_status_codes.MINTED: Published on Zora with independently verified contract or mint reference.
zora_status_codes.BURNED: Retracted or burned after falsification or governance action.

quest_board.description: Locate the official IFR press release for China robot density 2026 claim; archive and link to RV-2026-001.
quest_board.reward: Upgrade JST-2026-001 industrial-speed module toward CANON checkpoint.

quest_board.reward: Promote CC-2026-001 if clean; otherwise mark HELD.

quest_board.description: Monitor Chinese state media for 4T yuan grid investment official budget breakdown and capture with timestamp.

promotion_rules.name: Birth
promotion_rules.rule: Any OSINT analysis or AI output enters as CANDIDATE. DeepSeek outputs always start as CANDIDATE.

promotion_rules.name: Receipt binding
promotion_rules.rule: Each factual claim must link to a receipt artifact containing saved snapshot, URL, timestamp, and hash.

promotion_rules.name: Peer verification
promotion_rules.rule: Contradictory data moves artifact to HELD; disproven claims move to REJECTED; independent support with no unresolved contradiction can move toward CANON.

promotion_rules.name: Promotion gate
promotion_rules.rule: All receipts active, no unresolved HELD or REJECTED subclaims, and no Maxwell Demon inconsistency flag.

promotion_rules.name: Zora mint
promotion_rules.rule: Only CANON artifacts receive #CANON. Receipt artifacts may be minted independently as evidence objects after hash review.

promotion_rules.name: Retraction
promotion_rules.rule: If a CANON artifact is later falsified, mark as BURNED or RETRACTED and publish the reason in the Public Index.

first_public_caption_candidate.caption:
JAY'S STRESS TEST — CANON RELEASE

After receipt review, cross-validation, and no unresolved refutations, the Red Team Observer report on China's system resilience moves toward CANON.

Core modules: industrial speed, AI compute, space infrastructure, energy grid, and supply chain resilience.

Law: No receipt → no claim.

#ComputerWisdom #JaysStressTest #CANON #SystemsResilience #OpenIntelligence

hashing_instruction.canonicalization: JCS-style canonical JSON recommended before hashing.
